lines.text: Lessor lease revenue: operating $72,000,000, sales-type $4,000,000, direct financing $4,000,000 per ASC 842 842-30-50-3, 842-30-50-4.
Lessee ROU asset $3,500,000 and lease liability $3,600,000 recognized at commencement per ASC 842 842-20-45-1, 842-20-50-4.
Held-and-used impairment for retail portfolio: carrying amount $12,000,000, fair value $11,500,000 per ASC 360 360-10-35-21, 360-10-35-24.
Assets held for sale $2,500,000 and associated liabilities $400,000 classified per ASC 360 360-10-45-9, 360-10-45-10.
Real estate sales: full accrual $6,000,000, partial sales $1,500,000 per ASC 610-20 610-20-45-12, 610-20-25-6.
Acquisition of Riverfront Office Tower: purchase price $15,000,000, cap rate 6.2% per ASC 805 805-20-50-1, 805-30-50-1.
REIT non-GAAP measures: FFO $52,000,000, AFFO $48,000,000, NOI $61,000,000 reconciled per ASC 970 970-323-50-1, 970-323-50-2.
